name: Aube (France)
description: A blue field, the upper part yellow with a wavy lower edge, crossed by a white diagonal band edged on both sides with a yellow Greek-key (meander) pattern.
history: The flag evokes the Aube and Seine rivers crossing the historic county of Champagne, whose Greek-key motif recalls the region.

features.role: yellow upper field with a wavy lower edge
white bend edged with yellow Greek-key meander pattern
